Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present is present via representative Richard Beal.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo (415-923-9846) is present for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jack Tolbert is present.
Attorney Milena A Angelova (925-639-8300) is present for defendant in limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 501A, re settlement discussions. The case is settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed.
The trial date of JUN-23-2014 is vacated.
